Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime

Class ReportContext

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContext
Direct Known Subclasses:
ReportContext
public class ReportContext extends Object
Holds the context or criteria for generating a specific financial report. This includes the type of report, date ranges, output format, and any applicable filters such as selected budget, fund IDs, or account IDs for detail reports.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportContext

      public ReportContext()
      Default constructor for ReportContext. Initializes all fields to their default values (null for objects).

  • Method Details

    • getReportType

      public String getReportType()
      Gets the type of the report.
      Returns:
      The report type string.

    • setReportType

      public void setReportType(String reportType)
      Sets the type of the report.
      Parameters:
      reportType - The report type string (e.g., "income_statement").

    • getStartDate

      public LocalDate getStartDate()
      Gets the start date for the report period.
      Returns:
      The start LocalDate, or null if not set.

    • setStartDate

      public void setStartDate(LocalDate startDate)
      Sets the start date for the report period.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The start LocalDate to set.

    • getEndDate

      public LocalDate getEndDate()
      Gets the end date for the report period.
      Returns:
      The end LocalDate, or null if not set.

    • setEndDate

      public void setEndDate(LocalDate endDate)
      Sets the end date for the report period.
      Parameters:
      endDate - The end LocalDate to set.

    • getOutputFormat

      public String getOutputFormat()
      Gets the desired output format for the report.
      Returns:
      The output format string (e.g., "xlsx").

    • setOutputFormat

      public void setOutputFormat(String outputFormat)
      Sets the desired output format for the report.
      Parameters:
      outputFormat - The output format string to set (e.g., "xlsx", "pdf").

    • getExcelTemplateFile

      public File getExcelTemplateFile()
      Gets the Excel template file used for direct XLSX output.
      Returns:
      Excel template file or null if not set

    • setExcelTemplateFile

      public void setExcelTemplateFile(File excelTemplateFile)
      Sets the Excel template file used for direct XLSX output.
      Parameters:
      excelTemplateFile - template file to populate

    • getFundIds

      public List<String> getFundIds()
      Gets the list of fund IDs to be used for filtering the report.
      Returns:
      A list of fund ID strings. Can be null or empty.

    • setFundIds

      public void setFundIds(List<String> fundIds)
      Sets the list of fund IDs to be used for filtering the report.
      Parameters:
      fundIds - A list of fund ID strings to set.

    • getAccountIdsForDetailReport

      public List<String> getAccountIdsForDetailReport()
      Gets the list of account IDs to be used for detail sections or filtering in some reports.
      Returns:
      A list of account ID strings. Can be null or empty.

    • setAccountIdsForDetailReport

      public void setAccountIdsForDetailReport(List<String> accountIdsForDetailReport)
      Sets the list of account IDs to be used for detail sections or filtering in some reports.
      Parameters:
      accountIdsForDetailReport - A list of account ID strings to set.

    • getBeans

      public List<?> getBeans()
      Gets the list of beans prepared for Jasper report generation.
      Returns:
      List of beans or null if none were supplied.

    • setBeans

      public void setBeans(List<?> beans)
      Sets the list of beans to be used directly by a AbstractReportGenerator.
      Parameters:
      beans - data beans for the report

    • getNullPlaceholder

      public String getNullPlaceholder()
      Gets the placeholder used for null string fields in report output.
      Returns:
      placeholder string; defaults to "-" when unset, or null to disable placeholder substitution

    • setNullPlaceholder

      public void setNullPlaceholder(String nullPlaceholder)
      Sets the placeholder used for null string fields in report output.
      Parameters:
      nullPlaceholder - placeholder text to substitute for nulls; use null to leave nulls as-is, or an empty string for blank output

    • getNullPlaceholderSkipFields

      public List<String> getNullPlaceholderSkipFields()
      Gets the list of field names that should keep null values in output.
      Returns:
      list of field names or null if none are configured

    • setNullPlaceholderSkipFields

      public void setNullPlaceholderSkipFields(List<String> nullPlaceholderSkipFields)
      Sets the list of field names that should keep null values in output.
      Parameters:
      nullPlaceholderSkipFields - field names to exclude from placeholder substitution

    • getTransactionType

      public String getTransactionType()
      Gets the transaction type filter text (e.g., "DEBIT", "CREDIT").
      Returns:
      transaction type filter or null if not set

    • setTransactionType

      public void setTransactionType(String transactionType)
      Sets the transaction type filter text.
      Parameters:
      transactionType - type text to match against AccountSide

    • getMemoFilter

      public String getMemoFilter()
      Gets the memo substring filter for transaction lookups.
      Returns:
      memo substring or null

    • setMemoFilter

      public void setMemoFilter(String memoFilter)
      Sets the memo substring filter for transaction lookups.
      Parameters:
      memoFilter - substring to search for (case-insensitive)

    • isRequireAllAccounts

      public boolean isRequireAllAccounts()
      Indicates whether all provided accounts must be present on a transaction.
      Returns:
      true if all accounts are required; false to match any

    • setRequireAllAccounts

      public void setRequireAllAccounts(boolean requireAllAccounts)
      Sets whether a transaction must include all provided accounts.
      Parameters:
      requireAllAccounts - true to require all accounts, false to match any
